programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While in Final Fantasy Captain N is jealous of the Prince who is a friend of Princess Lana until a mysterious fairy godfather put Kevin in a spell which Lana Megaman and Kid Icarus must recover both the Prince and Captain N

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Underground War - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: During the Second World War the British commander of Singapore believed it to be an impregnable fortress until a numerically inferior Japanese Army overran it Similarly 12 years on the French lost the mountain garrison at Dien Bien Phu after failing to anticipate the resourcefulness of General Giap and his Vietmanese peasant army

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie - The Plot To Kill Hitler
programme.desc: Operation Valkyrie The Plot To Kill Hitler is the definitive film on Claus Schenk Graf von Stauffenberg and the ‘Valkyrie’ conspiracy to assassinate Hitler on 20th July 1944 Produced in collaboration with the official German Foundation dedicated to the memory of the conspirators it features testimonials and eyewitness accounts from all of the aristocratic families involved in the plot including the last living conspirator to escape Hitler’s wrath and Maria Countess von Stauffenberg who knew Claus all her life

programme.title: Hitchhiker 509
programme.desc: A homeless conman couple tries to swindle a seemingly senile old lady out of her home by trying to convince her that the war is still on Big mistake

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A man struggles with his age on his birthday believing that his son is out to kill him and a teenager confronts her mom about possibly being adopted

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A psychic clown and part-time cook who abuses his assistant and wife learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater and plans to runs off with him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction tries to get revenge with the help of his mentally challenged brother on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest unaware the driver also has a dark secret too

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: An emotionally unstable woman becomes obsessed with the idea that her husband is having an affair

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hymie is introduced to CONTROL as KAOS tries to kidnap a CONTROL scientist

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogans set-up at Stalag 13

programme.title: Hogans 311
programme.desc: Hogans 311

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A 3-Sister Singing Act is stranded on a deserted island and McHale and The 73 Crew have an ulterior motive when they volunteer for the rescue mission But the girls having had such experiences in the past are wise to their plan

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While out on a recon mission McHale and the 73 Crew discover a deserted plantation which they turn into a party house where they can enjoy themselves when not on duty But their activities draw the attention of both the US Navy and the Japanese

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E19
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E19

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E18
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E18

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As a crazy Army officer Max tries to prove that a psychiatrist is passing on confidential information to KAOS

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Conclusion At their high-school reunion Julie and her former boyfriend find theyll still attracted to each other

programme.title: WKRP 122

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor and Aimee Hilary Swajk elope and get married

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: In the series pilot Wood Newton a former NFL football player and the head coach of the local high school football team has to deal with his teams losing streak and the possible pregnancy of his wife

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Binzer goes to see Paula Conway a hypnotist for a little self improvement But what he doesnt know is she has been hired by some malefactors to turn him into their private assassin When Tanna notices Binzer has been missing for several days he looks for him While looking for Binzer Tanna runs into Jamie Randall an old friend who is a reporter doing research on point shaving at college basketball games It seems the men who hired Paula are the ones behind the point shaving and Binzer being hypnotized to kill Jamie and a player whom they approached who turned them down plus collateral damage and anyone who gets in Binzers way The trigger word that will turn Binzer lethal is superstar

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a researcher is kidnapped in a South American country by an old adversary of Jonathans he undertakes to personally deliver the ransom and ensure the safety of the researcher and his pregnant wife

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie is desperate to win back Michael after he dumps her first by belittling his new girlfriend Susan and then by taking lessons in being nice from George

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Daan leaves and doesnt being Liam along Zoor is frantic as to why Daan left Liam wants to help but Zoor doesnt trust him because he doesnt have a CVI so Liam agrees to be implanted But his CVI enables Zoor to see and hear what Liam does So he tells Renee She tells Street who comes up with a plan to make double of Liam which doesnt have a CVI so with the double they try to find Daan

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The remaining members of the team set up a new home and try to deal with their grief The Morthren also have to find a fresh refuge and as part of this they kidnap and duplicate a priest who runs a homeless shelter

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A glimpse into a future devastated by man-made environmental disaster ensures that Senator Parker will take action to prevent it happening - to the best of his ability at least But that may not be enough

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Dr Arcane dies during a mutation experiment gone wrong Graham accuses Stella of attempting to replace him in the lab by seducing Arcane During their fight Graham falls for Stella conceding that Arcane must have seduced her in mind if not body Their tender moment is ruined however when Graham is alerted to a break-in at the lab its Dr Arcane reduced to his inner beast by the failed experiment Can Graham stop him before tragedy strikes

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Moonbase Alpha is attacked and devastated by warships from a nearby planet With half of its population dead Alpha can no longer survive Commander Koenig and Dr Russel go to the alien world to plead for the survivors but the inhabitants wish no one to disturb their serene existence

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.desc: Keller faces charges of accidentally shooting an unarmed man during a chase; guest Michael Constantine

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a delivery driver Kimble rescues a man and a woman from the wreckage of a small airplane All three have a problem the man is a politician the woman is not his wife and Kimble doesnt want publicity as the rescuer

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: After a whirlwind courtship Nick proposes to a beautiful partygirl Eastern socialite Her interest in him soon disappears when she experiences the slow paced life on the ranch-and becomes obsessed with Heath

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is escorting a bride and 5000 to his boss He meets a friend who works now for the railroad who tells Cheyenne a group of young bandits are robbing trains They strike the train but their goal is more than robbing it

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.desc: The Renegades lure Leader-1 Turbo and Scooter into a trap full of hungry Zods

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: A damaged Turbo is repaired by two teenagers who unaware hes a GoBot enter him into a Grand Prix race; when the Renegades spot him the race turns into a demolition derby

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference
